short_text: Ish Sodhi to Fakhar Zaman, Lbw!! New Zealand looked pretty confident and wasted very little time in going upstairs. The
full_text: Ish Sodhi to Fakhar Zaman, Lbw!! New Zealand looked pretty confident and wasted very little time in going upstairs. The ball pitched on and around off-stump, spun back in ever so slightly before clonking Fakhar dead on the back pad. The batter was late to react and perhaps wasn't sure which way the ball was spinning. By the time he tried to push, the ball spun back and brushed his pad before rolling onto the bat face. The duo pinch a quick single and umpire Michael Gough almost looked prepared to signal a run.
